_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Stablecoin growth and MVRV compression near cycle lows suggest limited downside with upward drift toward Complacency as the path of least resistance, though macro hedging signals warrant only low conviction.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial — both see upward drift toward Complacency, but analyst holds at low conviction while narrative writer implies stronger accumulation-to-optimism trajectory
next_move.confirmed_if: Fear & Greed rises above 40 with DXY breaking below 100 and funding remaining subdued
next_move.invalidated_if: VIX spikes above 22 or BTC funding flips deeply negative with price breaking below $62K
